_comment: SEED manifest bundled with the app for offline-first launch. The MapSeedImporter loads each `path` from the asset bundle and RECOMPUTES sha256 + bytes locally (the seed is authenticated by the app-store signature, not re-hashed over the wire), so the sha256/bytes below are placeholders. The background reuses the EXISTING bundled KB image (assets/knowledge/images/hideous-dungeon-map.jpg) — no duplicated binary. The owner replaces all of this via the content repo. See AUDIT-V2 §4.1/§4.7.

maps.title: Hideous Dungeon
maps.subtitle: Sample map — replace via content repo
